problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
